meaning: n.[希神]阿伽门农,特洛伊战争中希腊军队的统帅
examples: As a result of divination, Apollo was angry with the Greeks. Because Agamemnon robbed his father's maiden, and his father was the high priest of Apollo.
Why call the murderer of Agamemnon "blameless Aegisthus"?
Agamemnon gets furious with Achilles, and he says, "No, I'm not giving back my girl."
Agamemnon sacrifices his eldest daughter, Iphigenia, to the gods for victory in the Trojan War.
Clytemnestra avenges her wronged daughter by murdering Agamemnon upon his return from Troy.
